prompt_text:
### Demographics: 53-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 15units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 85.3 kg; Height 182.9 cm; BMI 25.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 120/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 9.6%; 6 months ago 9.8%; 3 months ago 10.1%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 248mg/dL; 9 months ago 272mg/dL; 6 months ago 275mg/dL; 3 months ago 289mg/dL; current 252mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 84.2kg; 9 months ago 86.2kg; 6 months ago 83.3kg; 3 months ago 84.3kg; current 85.3kg), Height (12 months ago 182.9cm; 9 months ago 182.9cm; 6 months ago 182.9cm; 3 months ago 182.9cm; current 182.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 120mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 28U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 17U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 5.8mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.9mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 2.3mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 1.1mL/min/1.73m²; current 2mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 403mg/g; 9 months ago 317mg/g; 6 months ago 352mg/g; 3 months ago 539mg/g; current 505mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 89mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 177mg/dL; 9 months ago 178mg/dL; 6 months ago 177mg/dL; 3 months ago 175mg/dL; current 168mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
